name: HMS ML 116 (ML 116)
events: 2 Dec 1941 HMS H 44 (Lt. J.S. Stevens, DSC, RN) departed Portsmouth for Sheerness. She took passage astern of a convoy escorted by HMS ML 120. On the 3rd escort was taken over by HMS ML 116. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
